generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
network: Network error. Please check your connection.
unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.
notFound: The requested resource was not found.
serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
validation: Please check the form for errors.

form.tooLong: Must be no more than {{max}} characters

whatsappDisconnected.title: WhatsApp isn't connected
whatsappDisconnected.body: Nothing can be sent or received until you connect your WhatsApp number. Connect it, then try again.

notOnWhatsapp.title: This number isn't on WhatsApp
notOnWhatsapp.body: {{phone}} doesn't have an active WhatsApp account, so the message couldn't be delivered. Double-check the number and country code.
notOnWhatsapp.bodyNoPhone: This number doesn't have an active WhatsApp account, so the message couldn't be delivered. Double-check the number and country code.

invalidPhone.title: That phone number looks off
invalidPhone.body: The number isn't in a valid format. Use the full international format, e.g. +9665XXXXXXXX.

emptyMessage.title: Nothing to send
emptyMessage.body: Add a message or an attachment before sending.

warmupLimit.title: Daily warm-up limit reached
warmupLimit.body: New numbers are throttled while they warm up to protect them from bans. You've sent {{sent}} of {{limit}} today — the limit resets at midnight.
warmupLimit.bodyGeneric: New numbers are throttled while they warm up to protect them from bans. The daily limit resets at midnight.

tooManyRecipients.title: Too many recipients for one send
tooManyRecipients.body: You can send to up to {{max}} contacts at once from here. For a bigger audience, use a Broadcast instead.
tooManyRecipients.bodyGeneric: You've picked more recipients than a single send allows. For a bigger audience, use a Broadcast instead.

rateLimited.title: Sending a little too fast
rateLimited.body: To stay safe from bans, messages are paced out automatically. Wait a moment, then try again.

mediaFailed.title: The attachment couldn't be sent
mediaFailed.body: We couldn't upload or fetch the file. Re-attach it and try again.

auth.title: Your session expired
auth.body: For your security you've been signed out. Please sign in again to continue.

network.title: Can't reach the server
network.body: We couldn't connect to the server. Check your internet connection and try again.

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.body: The action didn't go through. Please try again — if it keeps happening, contact support.
